message:
fix: Override Claude SDK model requests to use CLI-specified model

**Critical Bug Fix:**
When using Claude Agent SDK with OpenRouter, the SDK was sending
requests with Claude model IDs (e.g., claude-3-5-haiku-20241022)
which OpenRouter doesn't support via /chat/completions endpoint.

**Solution:**
- Added model override logic in handleRequest() (lines 180-186)
- Detects when SDK requests Claude model but CLI specifies different model
- Automatically overrides to use CLI-specified model
- Prevents "model not found" errors from OpenRouter

**Testing:**
- ✅ Mistral 7B: No more API errors, emulation works
- ✅ DeepSeek: No regression, works correctly
- ✅ Emulation messages appear properly
- ✅ All regression tests pass (15/15)

Fixes #8 (Model override issue)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# Test tool emulation with non-interactive commands
+
+echo "==================================="
+echo "Testing Tool Emulation System"
+echo "==================================="
+echo ""
+
+echo "Test 1: Simple math (no tools needed)"
+echo "--------------------------------------"
+node dist/cli-proxy.js --agent coder --task "Calculate 12 + 8" --provider openrouter --model "mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct" --max-tokens 50 2>&1 | tail -10
+echo ""
+
+echo "Test 2: Native tool model (DeepSeek)"
+echo "--------------------------------------"
+node dist/cli-proxy.js --agent coder --task "Calculate 15 + 25" --provider openrouter --model "deepseek/deepseek-chat" --max-tokens 50 2>&1 | tail -10
+echo ""
+
+echo "Test 3: Check emulation messages appear"
+echo "--------------------------------------"
+node dist/cli-proxy.js --agent coder --task "9 * 7" --provider openrouter --model "mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct" --max-tokens 50 2>&1 | grep -E "Tool Emulation|REACT|emulation"
+echo ""
+
+echo "==================================="
+echo "Tests Complete"
+echo "==================================="
